title: Fix config hash inputs so runtime hash reflects real live gate and anti-repeat variables
status: QUEUED — activate when LATE_INNING_BLOCK_WIRING_FIX_001 is APPROVED (shared file lock: bot_core.py + core/risk.py)
depends_on: LATE_INNING_BLOCK_WIRING_FIX_001 APPROVED — must be done first so any new env vars it introduces (LATE_INNING_BLOCK read in risk.py or bot_core.py) are present in source before this task expands the hash input list
RESTART_CONFIG_HASH_VERIFY_001 APPROVED — confirmed current hash is stale and fix is needed
must_precede: STARTUP_PROOF_BLOCK_001 — startup proof emits config_hash; that hash must be derived from corrected inputs or the proof block is still misleading

context.problem: Tonight proved the config_hash check was misleading. MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE and MIN_ENTRY_PRICE were not in the hash input set, so the hash never changed when those vars were updated in .env. The operator could not trust whether a restart had actually loaded new gate values. This is a Track A runtime truth gap, not a strategy issue.
missing_vars_to_add: MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE — hard confidence floor that actually gates entries
LATE_INNING_BLOCK — inning block threshold (newly wired by LATE_INNING_BLOCK_WIRING_FIX_001)
conditional_vars: Any session-level anti-repeat env vars that exist in source at execution time (e.g. MAX_SLUG_ENTRIES_SESSION from SESSION_MARKET_TRADE_CAP_001). Include only vars that actually exist in the codebase when this task runs — do not add phantom vars.
context.classification: Track A — config activation / runtime truth
context.why_not_strategy: This task only changes which vars are hashed. No thresholds, gate logic, or trade behavior changes.

objective: Expand the config_hash input set to include the real live gate variables so that any meaningful config change causes the hash to change, making restart verification reliable and honest.
forbidden_files: Any file not listed in allowed_files
forbidden_actions: DO NOT ACTIVATE while LATE_INNING_BLOCK_WIRING_FIX_001 is ACTIVE — file lock conflict on bot_core.py and core/risk.py
No threshold tuning or gate logic changes
Do not add env vars that do not yet exist in source
required_work: 1. Read bot_core.py — find the config_hash([...]) call and the current var list. Read core/utils.py to confirm config_hash() implementation.
2. Confirm the current list is missing MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE, MIN_ENTRY_PRICE, MAX_TRADES_PER_MARKET, LATE_INNING_BLOCK.
3. Expand the list to add those four vars. Keep AUTO_STOP_LOSS_PCT (already present). Keep all existing vars.
4. Check whether any session-level anti-repeat env vars (e.g. MAX_SLUG_ENTRIES_SESSION) now exist in source — if yes, add them. If not yet present, do not add.
5. Keep the input list sorted or explicitly ordered for determinism. Add a brief inline comment identifying this as the gate-critical config var set.
6. Run python -m py_compile on every changed file.
acceptance_criteria: Hash input set includes at minimum: MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE, MIN_ENTRY_PRICE, MAX_TRADES_PER_MARKET, LATE_INNING_BLOCK, AUTO_STOP_LOSS_PCT
All pre-existing vars remain in the list (no accidental removals)
Any session-level anti-repeat env vars present in source at execution time are included
Input list is explicitly ordered for determinism
No gate logic, thresholds, or trade decisions changed
No files outside allowed scope modified
python -m py_compile passes for every changed file
verification_required: Show exact before/after of the config_hash input list
State the line number in bot_core.py where CONFIG_HASH is computed
List any conditional session-level vars found in source and whether they were included or excluded (and why)
Run py_compile on all changed files and report PASS/FAIL
sequencing_note: Must precede STARTUP_PROOF_BLOCK_001. The startup proof block emits config_hash. If this fix has not run first, the emitted hash still has an incomplete input set and the proof block is still misleading. Fix the inputs, then make them observable.
rollback: Revert only bot_core.py (and core/risk.py if modified) if this task needs to be reverted.
restart_note: Restart required for runtime/state.json to reflect the corrected config_hash value.
